title: Structure a Long Document
description: Find the right outline for a sprawling piece.
content:
I need to structure a long piece covering: {{material}}

Propose an outline that gives the reader a clear path. Decide the organizing principle (chronological, by theme, problem-then-solution, general-to-specific) and justify it for this material. Show the section flow and what each section must accomplish. Flag where a reader would get lost or lose momentum, and what to cut or move. Lead with what the reader most needs first.
